name: OneSignal
description: OneSignal is a customer engagement platform for push notifications, email, SMS, and in-app messaging. Use this API to send notifications across channels, manage users and segments, create templates, and track delivery.

capabilities.name: notifications_create
capabilities.description: Send push notifications, emails, SMS, or Live Activities to users, segments, or specific devices.

capabilities.name: notifications_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details and analytics for a sent notification.

capabilities.name: notifications_list
capabilities.description: List sent notifications for an app with pagination.

capabilities.name: notifications_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a scheduled or currently sending notification.

capabilities.name: users_create
capabilities.description: Create a new user with properties and subscriptions.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a user including aliases, properties, and subscriptions.

capabilities.name: users_update
capabilities.description: Update a user's properties and tags.

capabilities.name: users_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a user and all associated subscriptions.

capabilities.name: segments_create
capabilities.description: Create a user segment with filters.

capabilities.name: segments_list
capabilities.description: List all segments for an app.

capabilities.name: segments_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a segment.

capabilities.name: templates_create
capabilities.description: Create a reusable message template for push, email, or SMS.

capabilities.name: templates_list
capabilities.description: List all message templates for an app.

capabilities.name: templates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific template by ID.

capabilities.name: templates_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing message template.

capabilities.name: templates_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a message template.

capabilities.name: apps_list
capabilities.description: List all OneSignal apps for the authenticated account.

capabilities.name: apps_get
capabilities.description: View details of a single app.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_create
capabilities.description: Create a new subscription (push, email, SMS) for a user.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_update
capabilities.description: Update a subscription's properties.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a subscription.
